name: Documents Header Link
uri: client-side only — no route change; sets activeSection='documents' in App state
notes: Clicking 'Documents' calls onNavigate('documents'), a prop passed from App.jsx as this.handleNavigate.
App.handleNavigate sets this.state.activeSection = 'documents', causing the workspace content area to re-render showing DocumentGrid.
The Header component is only mounted when AuthContext.isAuthenticated is true; the entire app tree is replaced by LoginForm otherwise.
Header nav exposes 3 links (documents, upload, search); Sidebar exposes 4 (adds 'tags'). The two nav surfaces are independent — clicking either sets the same App.state.activeSection field.
